# LibTomCrypt

This directory contains a copy of the `src/` directory from
[LibTomCrypt](https://github.com/libtom/libtomcrypt), version **1.18.2**.

Only the source code (`src/`) and `LICENSE` file are included. Build files,
tests, documentation, and other supporting files from the upstream repository
are not copied.

## Upstream

- Repository: https://github.com/libtom/libtomcrypt
- Release: https://github.com/libtom/libtomcrypt/releases/tag/v1.18.2
- License: SPDX [Unlicense](LICENSE)
